name: Web parity (merged list + scope toggle)
description: Web `BudgetDTO`/`useBudgetListQuery` mirror TMA. `budgets-page.tsx` renders the unioned list with a scope badge per card. `create-budget-dialog.tsx` gains the scope toggle; `edit-budget-dialog.tsx` shows scope + currency + owner; both flows build the scope-aware payload.

done: TMA budget types (`types.ts`) now match web parity: `BudgetScope`, nullable `householdId`/`ownerUserId`, discriminated `CreateBudgetRequest`, `ListBudgetsParams`.
TMA budget API (`api.ts`) now builds query strings from `ListBudgetsParams` and uses stable tuple query keys.
TMA budget list page (`budget-list-page.tsx`) now renders a merged unioned list with scope filter chips and scope-tagged cards.
TMA create budget page (`create-budget-page.tsx`) now has scope toggle with conditional household/currency fields.
TMA budget detail page (`budget-detail-page.tsx`) now shows scope label and ownership-based edit permissions.
TMA presentation helpers (`presentation.ts`) now include `getBudgetScopeLabel` and scope-aware `buildBudgetMutationRequest`.
TMA typecheck + lint + test + build OK via `./init.sh`.
